title: ageratina viejoana
intro: Ageratina viejoana, also known as Viejoana, is a type of flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ageratina viejoana include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Ageratina viejoana can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
